features.name: Harness generation
features.defaultDataFlow: Runs locally against the selected target repository and writes repo-owned harness files.

externalAi.fallback: All generation works without external AI.

features.sensitivityNote: Generated output must redact common machine-local absolute home paths.

features.name: Harness audit
features.defaultDataFlow: Reads known repo files and emits local text, JSON, or HTML reports.
features.sensitivityNote: Audit reports should not include raw secrets or machine-specific absolute paths.

features.name: Scheduled research refresh
features.defaultDataFlow: Fetches allowlisted public source pages and writes compact metadata for review.

externalAi.fallback: Current implementation uses standard-library HTTP fetching only.

features.sensitivityNote: Do not add private repositories, credentialed sources, or paid model calls to the default scheduled workflow.
